title: Read the YNova MBS intern review and handoff guide
notes: Use the guide to explain the product loop, frontend/backend boundaries, review checklist, and first 30-day learning path back to Tamil.

title: Read the complete YNova app onboarding guide and mark unknowns
notes: Read simple overview first, then product architecture, then ultra-detailed engineering sections. Add review notes for unclear areas.

title: Read the YNova MBS intern book and build a personal codebase map
notes: Use the chapter plan, diagrams, scenario walkthroughs, and glossary to explain the MBS product loop and codebase structure back to Tamil in simple terms.

title: Read the YNova MBS architecture overview and write five questions
notes: Focus on route structure, stores, backend boundaries, and why scoring logic must not be duplicated.

title: Run the MBS local dev environment and capture first-run friction
notes: Use the repo commands, record missing docs, and separate actual blockers from first-time setup confusion.

title: Map how Codex, Claude, and NOVA should divide responsibilities
notes: Produce a short diagram of human review gates, repo-writing agents, and runtime AI features.

title: Set up the weekly Tamil and Yaomin product handoff rhythm
notes: Define agenda, artifacts, decision log location, and escalation rules.

title: Review NOVA mascot states and decide which states belong in PM docs
notes: Keep the mascot useful. Avoid decorative overuse in operational docs and dashboards.

title: Draft a one-page PRD for profile settings interests and school editing
notes: Tie requirements to current TASK_TODO.md, affected routes, backend contract, and verification.

title: Review the Capacitor mobile guide and list platform risks
notes: Focus on microphone permissions, auth redirects, app resume, safe areas, audio playback, and what must be tested on Android or iOS.

title: Use the design system guide to review one MBS screen
notes: Pick one screen and check user goal, next action, error state, mobile risk, NOVA state, copy quality, and accessibility.

title: Shadow one code review and rewrite findings in severity order
notes: Practice leading with bugs and risks before summaries or praise.

title: Turn the Claude operating guide into a reusable prompt checklist
notes: Keep it short enough to paste into future planning sessions.

title: Identify three product actions that need Sentry breadcrumbs
notes: Do not include PII or learner-generated speech content in breadcrumb data.

title: Publish week one learnings and open questions
notes: Summarize what is understood, what is still ambiguous, and where Tamil needs to make a decision.
